adapters.input_contract_hint: No mutation; report XStack catalog/status and known validation entrypoints.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Structured status JSON plus markdown summary under .aide/tools/.
adapters.risk_notes: XStack is a legacy governance/tooling system; wrapper-first only.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must be proven non-mutating before execution is enabled.

adapters.input_contract_hint: Bundle or registry path; no generated promotion.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Validation result and evidence refs only.
adapters.risk_notes: May touch validation/build assumptions; execution remains disabled in Q51.
adapters.validation_requirement: Q52+ must prove safe arguments and side effects before enabling.

adapters.input_contract_hint: Repo path or scoped audit group; report-only mode required.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Audit findings under .aide/tools/ without rewriting source reports.
adapters.risk_notes: Audit surfaces may reference protected doctrine and release policy.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must separate generated evidence from canonical doctrine.

adapters.input_contract_hint: RepoX ruleset path and repository snapshot.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Policy validation evidence; no branch or file mutation.
adapters.risk_notes: Repo policy tooling is authority-sensitive and branch-sensitive.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must confirm rule checker is read-only before wrapper execution.

adapters.input_contract_hint: Named safe suite/profile only after Q52+ proof.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Test evidence refs and command transcript summary.
adapters.risk_notes: Do not execute broad historical test runners until safe profile is proven.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must classify runtime/build side effects and expected duration.

adapters.risk_notes: Candidate wrapper only; not executed in Q51.
adapters.validation_requirement: Confirm the documented FAST command is non-mutating and quick.

adapters.risk_notes: May be expensive or broad; keep disabled until proven.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must be opt-in after duration and mutation risk are documented.

adapters.input_contract_hint: CMake preset and build directory policy.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Build plan only unless future task authorizes execution.
adapters.validation_requirement: Never run clean/package by default; build execution requires explicit future scope.

adapters.output_contract_hint: Docs consistency evidence without doctrine rewrite.
adapters.validation_requirement: Must respect AGENTS.md and canon authority ordering.

adapters.input_contract_hint: Targeted local scan paths; no network.
adapters.risk_notes: Security-sensitive; require redaction and no provider calls.
adapters.validation_requirement: No raw secrets in committed evidence.

adapters.input_contract_hint: Release gate profile only; no publishing.
adapters.output_contract_hint: Release readiness evidence; no tags/releases/CI mutation.
adapters.validation_requirement: Future release-control task required before any active release action.

q51_policy: discover -> classify -> map capability -> plan wrapper -> preserve; no deletion, rename, move, migration, or unknown execution in Q51
